title: Sohatuy's Medieval Structures
description: A mod, that adds medieval structures to minecraft, as a tavern, a hermits hut, and other structures.
body:
A medieval mod, which will immerse you in the medieval world, with many medieval structures, as a beautiful tavern, a giant castle, a hermit's house, and some campfires. Mod requires:
1. Enigmatic Legacy
2. Alcocraft+
3. Amendments
4. Dungeons and Combat
5. Farmers Delight
6. Iron's Chests
7. Macaw's Furniture
8. More vilagers - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers
9. Quark
